<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-TW">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>階段一：奠基期 | 五十音與發音</title>
    <style>
        /* =========================================
           1. 全域變數與和風簡約色彩設定
           ========================================= */
        :root {
            --bg-washi: #F9F8F6;
            --primary-blue: #2C3E50;
            --matcha-green: #6B8E23;
            --accent-red: #E74C3C;
            --sakura-pink: #E8849A;
            --yuzu-yellow: #F0A500;
            --text-dark: #333333;
            --text-light: #7F8C8D;
            --sidebar-bg: #FFFFFF;
        }

        * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

        body {
            font-family: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, "PingFang TC", "Microsoft JhengHei", sans-serif;
            background-color: var(--bg-washi);
            color: var(--text-dark);
            display: flex;
            height: 100vh;
            overflow: hidden;
            background-image: radial-gradient(#e2e0d8 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 20px 20px;
        }

        /* =========================================
           2. 側邊欄
           ========================================= */
        .sidebar {
            width: 260px;
            background-color: var(--sidebar-bg);
            box-shadow: 2px 0 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.03);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            padding: 30px 20px;
            z-index: 10;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .sidebar-title {
            font-size: 1.15rem;
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            padding-bottom: 15px;
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--bg-washi);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            line-height: 1.4;
        }

        .nav-menu { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }

        .nav-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            text-align: left;
            padding: 13px 18px;
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--text-light);
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            line-height: 1.4;
        }

        .nav-btn:hover { background-color: var(--bg-washi); color: var(--primary-blue); }
        .nav-btn.active { background-color: var(--primary-blue); color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(44,62,80,0.2); }

        /* =========================================
           3. 主內容區
           ========================================= */
        .main-content { flex: 1; padding: 40px 50px; overflow-y: auto; }

        .tab-section { display: none; animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease-in-out; }
        .tab-section.active { display: block; }

        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
            to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }

        .section-header {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            margin-bottom: 25px;
            border-left: 5px solid var(--accent-red);
            padding-left: 15px;
        }

        /* =========================================
           4. 子分頁橫列
           ========================================= */
        .sub-tabs-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .sub-tab-btn {
            background: #fff;
            border: 2px solid #dde1e7;
            color: var(--text-light);
            padding: 8px 18px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.25s;
        }

        .sub-tab-btn:hover { border-color: var(--primary-blue); color: var(--primary-blue); }
        .sub-tab-btn.active { background: var(--primary-blue); border-color: var(--primary-blue); color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 3px 8px rgba(44,62,80,0.2); }

        .sub-tab-content { display: none; animation: fadeIn 0.35s ease-in-out; }
        .sub-tab-content.active { display: block; }

        /* =========================================
           5. 共用卡片
           ========================================= */
        .lesson-intro {
            background: #fff;
            padding: 25px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.02);
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            border-left: 5px solid var(--primary-blue);
        }

        .lesson-intro.pink  { border-left-color: var(--sakura-pink); }
        .lesson-intro.green { border-left-color: var(--matcha-green); }
        .lesson-intro.gold  { border-left-color: var(--yuzu-yellow); }

        .lesson-intro h2 { color: var(--primary-blue); margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 12px; font-size: 1.45rem; }
        .lesson-intro.pink  h2 { color: var(--sakura-pink); }
        .lesson-intro.green h2 { color: var(--matcha-green); }
        .lesson-intro.gold  h2 { color: var(--yuzu-yellow); }
        .lesson-intro p { color: var(--text-dark); line-height: 1.7; font-size: 0.98rem; }

        .section-divider { border-top: 2px dashed #BDC3C7; margin: 40px 0; }

        .info-box {
            background: #EBF5FB;
            border-left: 4px solid #3498DB;
            padding: 12px 18px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 0.92rem;
            color: #2C3E50;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }

        .alert-box {
            background: #FDEDEC;
            border-left: 4px solid var(--accent-red);
            padding: 12px 18px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 0.92rem;
            color: #922B21;
            margin-top: 12px;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }

        .tip-box {
            background: #FEF9E7;
            border-left: 4px solid var(--yuzu-yellow);
            padding: 12px 18px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 0.92rem;
            color: #7E5109;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }

        /* =========================================
           A-1. 五十音表格 (hiragana / katakana)
           ========================================= */
        .gojuon-table-wrap {
            overflow-x: auto;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }

        .gojuon-table {
            border-collapse: separate;
            border-spacing: 6px;
            min-width: 620px;
        }

        .gojuon-table th {
            background: var(--primary-blue);
            color: #fff;
            padding: 8px 14px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            text-align: center;
            min-width: 70px;
        }

        .kana-cell {
            background: #fff;
            border: 2px solid #e8eaed;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 10px 8px;
            text-align: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            min-width: 70px;
        }

        .kana-cell:hover { border-color: var(--sakura-pink); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(232,132,154,0.25); }
        .kana-cell.flipped { background: #FFF0F3; border-color: var(--sakura-pink); }
        .kana-cell .kana-jp { font-size: 1.6rem; color: var(--primary-blue); display: block; line-height: 1.2; font-weight: bold; }
        .kana-cell .kana-rom { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-light); display: block; margin-top: 3px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
        .kana-cell .kana-hint { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--sakura-pink); display: none; margin-top: 2px; }
        .kana-cell.flipped .kana-hint { display: block; }

        .row-label {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: var(--text-light);
            font-weight: bold;
            text-align: center;
            vertical-align: middle;
            padding: 0 6px;
        }

        .kana-toggle-bar {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .toggle-btn {
            background: #fff;
            border: 2px solid var(--primary-blue);
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            padding: 7px 20px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .toggle-btn.active { background: var(--primary-blue); color: #fff; }
        .toggle-btn:hover:not(.active) { background: #EAF0F6; }

        /* =========================================
           A-2. 筆順動畫 + 聯想記憶卡
           ========================================= */
        .mnemo-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(140px, 1fr));
            gap: 16px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }

        .mnemo-card {
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 14px;
            padding: 18px 14px;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
            border-top: 4px solid var(--sakura-pink);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
            user-select: none;
        }

        .mnemo-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(232,132,154,0.2); }

        .mnemo-kana { font-size: 2.8rem; color: var(--primary-blue); font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 6px; }
        .mnemo-rom  { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-light); margin-bottom: 8px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; }
        .mnemo-emoji { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 4px; }
        .mnemo-hint { font-size: 0.78rem; color: #7B68EE; font-weight: 500; }
        .mnemo-zh   { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-light); margin-top: 4px; }

        /* 筆順 SVG 動畫 */
        .stroke-demo-area {
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 25px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }

        .stroke-demo-area h3 { color: var(--primary-blue); margin-bottom: 18px; font-size: 1.15rem; }

        .stroke-selector {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }

        .stroke-kana-btn {
            background: #F9F8F6;
            border: 2px solid #dde1e7;
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            padding: 6px 14px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            font-weight: bold;
        }

        .stroke-kana-btn:hover, .stroke-kana-btn.active { background: var(--primary-blue); color: #fff; border-color: var(--primary-blue); }

        .stroke-canvas-wrap {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-start;
            gap: 30px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .stroke-canvas {
            width: 160px;
            height: 160px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 12px;
            background: #FAFAFA;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .stroke-canvas::before, .stroke-canvas::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            background: #f0ede8;
        }

        .stroke-canvas::before { width: 1px; height: 100%; left: 50%; top: 0; }
        .stroke-canvas::after  { width: 100%; height: 1px; left: 0; top: 50%; }

        .stroke-big-char {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 7rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: rgba(44,62,80,0.08);
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 0;
        }

        .stroke-anim-svg {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .stroke-path {
            fill: none;
            stroke: var(--primary-blue);
            stroke-width: 10;
            stroke-linecap: round;
            stroke-linejoin: round;
        }

        .stroke-path.anim-stroke {
            stroke-dasharray: 300;
            stroke-dashoffset: 300;
            animation: drawStroke 0.6s ease-in-out forwards;
        }

        @keyframes drawStroke {
            to { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
        }

        .stroke-number {
            fill: var(--accent-red);
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }

        .stroke-info {
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 180px;
        }

        .stroke-info h4 { font-size: 1.6rem; color: var(--primary-blue); margin-bottom: 6px; }
        .stroke-info .rom-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            background: var(--primary-blue);
            color: #fff;
            padding: 3px 12px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .stroke-steps { list-style: none; padding: 0; }
        .stroke-steps li {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            padding: 8px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px dashed #eee;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            color: var(--text-dark);
        }

        .stroke-step-num {
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            background: var(--accent-red);
            color: #fff;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .replay-btn {
            background: var(--accent-red);
            color: #fff;
            border: none;
            padding: 9px 22px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            margin-top: 15px;
            transition: background 0.2s;
        }
        .replay-btn:hover { background: #C0392B; }

        /* =========================================
           A-3. 音的分類展示
           ========================================= */
        .sound-cards-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }

        .sound-card {
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 22px;
            box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
            border-top: 5px solid;
        }

        .sound-card.seion   { border-top-color: #3498DB; }
        .sound-card.dakuten { border-top-color: #E74C3C; }
        .sound-card.handaku { border-top-color: #E67E22; }
        .sound-card.youon   { border-top-color: #8E44AD; }
        .sound-card.sokuon  { border-top-color: var(--matcha-green); }
        .sound-card.choon   { border-top-color: var(--sakura-pink); }

        .sound-card h3 { font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 8px; }
        .sound-card.seion   h3 { color: #3498DB; }
        .sound-card.dakuten h3 { color: #E74C3C; }
        .sound-card.handaku h3 { color: #E67E22; }
        .sound-card.youon   h3 { color: #8E44AD; }
        .sound-card.sokuon  h3 { color: var(--matcha-green); }
        .sound-card.choon   h3 { color: var(--sakura-pink); }

        .sound-card p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--text-light); line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 12px; }

        .kana-sample-row {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .kana-sample {
            background: var(--bg-washi);
            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            font-size: 1.05rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            text-align: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.15s;
        }

        .kana-sample:hover { background: #fff; border-color: var(--primary-blue); transform: scale(1.05); }

        .kana-pair { display: flex; gap: 4px; align-items: center; font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-light); }
        .kana-pair .arrow { font-size: 0.75rem; }

        /* =========================================
           A-4. 重音圖像化
           ========================================= */
        .accent-showcase {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }

        .accent-card {
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 14px;
            padding: 22px;
            box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
            border: 2px solid #eee;
            transition: box-shadow 0.2s;
        }

        .accent-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }

        .accent-word {
            font-size: 2rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            margin-bottom: 4px;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
        }

        .accent-meaning {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: var(--text-light);
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }

        /* 音調線圖 */
        .pitch-diagram {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-end;
            gap: 0;
            margin-bottom: 14px;
            height: 60px;
            position: relative;
        }

        .pitch-mora {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            width: 46px;
            position: relative;
        }

        .pitch-dot {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 3px solid var(--primary-blue);
            background: #fff;
            position: absolute;
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .pitch-dot.high { top: 4px; background: var(--primary-blue); }
        .pitch-dot.low  { top: 38px; }

        .pitch-connector {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 60px;
            z-index: 1;
            overflow: visible;
        }

        .pitch-kana {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: -22px;
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: var(--primary-blue);
        }

        .pitch-rom {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: -38px;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            color: var(--text-light);
        }

        .pitch-label {
            display: inline-block;
            background: var(--bg-washi);
            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 6px;
            padding: 4px 10px;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--text-dark);
            margin-top: 18px;
        }

        .pitch-listen-btn {
            background: none;
            border: 2px solid var(--primary-blue);
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 6px 16px;
            font-size: 0.88rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            margin-top: 10px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .pitch-listen-btn:hover { background: var(--primary-blue); color: #fff; }

        /* =========================================
           A-5. 寒暄語表 + 互動練習
           ========================================= */
        .greeting-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
            gap: 18px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }

        .greeting-card {
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 14px;
            padding: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
            border-left: 5px solid var(--matcha-green);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
            user-select: none;
        }

        .greeting-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
        .greeting-card.played { border-left-color: var(--sakura-pink); }

        .greeting-jp   { font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: bold; color: var(--primary-blue); }
        .greeting-rom  { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-light); letter-spacing: 0.05em; }
        .greeting-zh   { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--text-dark); font-weight: 500; }
        .greeting-usage { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--matcha-green); background: #F4F8ED; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 10px; width: fit-content; }
        .greeting-play { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-light); margin-top: 4px; }

        /* 問答遊戲 */
        .quiz-game-wrap {
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 14px;
            border: 2px dashed #BDC3C7;
            padding: 30px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }

        .quiz-game-wrap h3 { color: var(--primary-blue); margin-bottom: 6px; font-size: 1.2rem; }
        .quiz-subtitle { color: var(--text-light); font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 24px; }

        .quiz-prompt-box {
            background: var(--bg-washi);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 24px;
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 22px;
        }

        .quiz-situation { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--text-light); margin-bottom: 10px; }
        .quiz-question  { font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: bold; color: var(--primary-blue); }

        .quiz-options {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }

        .quiz-opt-btn {
            background: #fff;
            border: 2px solid #dde1e7;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 14px 12px;
            font-size: 1rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 1.5;
        }

        .quiz-opt-btn:hover:not(:disabled) { border-color: var(--primary-blue); background: #EAF0F6; }
        .quiz-opt-btn.correct { background: #D5F5E3; border-color: #27AE60; color: #1E8449; pointer-events: none; }
        .quiz-opt-btn.wrong   { background: #FDEDEC; border-color: var(--accent-red); color: var(--accent-red); animation: shake 0.35s; }

        @keyframes shake {
            10%, 90% { transform: translate3d(-2px, 0, 0); }
            20%, 80% { transform: translate3d(4px, 0, 0); }
            30%, 50%, 70% { transform: translate3d(-5px, 0, 0); }
            40%, 60% { transform: translate3d(5px, 0, 0); }
        }

        .quiz-feedback {
            min-height: 28px;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 1rem;
            color: var(--matcha-green);
        }

        .quiz-progress-row {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-top: 18px;
        }

        .quiz-score-badge {
            background: var(--primary-blue);
            color: #fff;
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 5px 16px;
            font-size: 0.88rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        .quiz-bar-wrap {
            flex: 1;
            height: 8px;
            background: #e0e4e8;
            border-radius: 4px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .quiz-bar-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: var(--matcha-green);
            border-radius: 4px;
            transition: width 0.4s ease;
        }

        .next-q-btn {
            background: var(--matcha-green);
            color: #fff;
            border: none;
            padding: 10px 24px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.2s;
            display: none;
        }
        .next-q-btn:hover { background: #5a7a1d; }
        .next-q-btn.show { display: block; }

        /* =========================================
           A-6. 重音互動視覺化
           ========================================= */
        .pitch-comparison {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }

        .pitch-compare-card {
            flex: 1;
            min-width: 220px;
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 14px;
            padding: 22px;
            box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
            text-align: center;
        }

        .pitch-compare-card .word-pair {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }

        .pitch-compare-card .word-meaning {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            color: var(--text-light);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        /* 線條圖 */
        .pitch-line-svg { width: 100%; max-width: 200px; height: 70px; display: block; margin: 0 auto 8px; }

        /* =========================================
           A-7. 假名測驗（翻牌）
           ========================================= */
        .flip-quiz-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(90px, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }

        .flip-card {
            height: 90px;
            perspective: 600px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .flip-card-inner {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            transition: transform 0.5s;
            transform-style: preserve-3d;
            position: relative;
        }

        .flip-card.flipped .flip-card-inner { transform: rotateY(180deg); }

        .flip-front, .flip-back {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            border-radius: 12px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            backface-visibility: hidden;
            -webkit-backface-visibility: hidden;
        }

        .flip-front {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2C3E50, #34495E);
            color: #fff;
            font-size: 2rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(44,62,80,0.2);
        }

        .flip-back {
            background: #fff;
            border: 2px solid var(--sakura-pink);
            transform: rotateY(180deg);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            font-weight: 600;
            gap: 4px;
        }

        .flip-back .rom { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: bold; }
        .flip-back .memo { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--sakura-pink); text-align: center; padding: 0 4px; }

        /* =========================================
           GENERAL: Table of sounds
           ========================================= */
        .table-container {
            overflow-x: auto;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
        }

        .std-table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
            background: #fff;
            text-align: center;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
        }

        .std-table th { background: var(--primary-blue); color: #fff; padding: 12px; font-weight: 500; }
        .std-table td { padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; }
        .std-table tr:hover td { background: #F9F8F6; }
        .std-table .hl { color: var(--accent-red); font-weight: bold; }
        .std-table .sub { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-light); }

        /* =========================================
           Progress ring for welcome screen
           ========================================= */
        .welcome-banner {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2C3E50, #34495E);
            color: #fff;
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 30px 35px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 25px;
        }

        .welcome-emoji { font-size: 3rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .welcome-text h2 { font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 8px; }
        .welcome-text p  { font-size: 0.95rem; opacity: 0.85; line-height: 1.6; }

        .overview-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr));
            gap: 16px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
        }

        .overview-card {
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 20px;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
            border-top: 4px solid;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        .overview-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); }
        .overview-card:nth-child(1) { border-top-color: var(--sakura-pink); }
        .overview-card:nth-child(2) { border-top-color: #3498DB; }
        .overview-card:nth-child(3) { border-top-color: var(--matcha-green); }
        .overview-card:nth-child(4) { border-top-color: var(--yuzu-yellow); }

        .overview-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 8px; }
        .overview-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: bold; color: var(--primary-blue); margin-bottom: 4px; }
        .overview-desc  { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-light); line-height: 1.5; }

        /* =========================================
           @keyframes popIn
           ========================================= */
        @keyframes popIn {
            0%   { transform: scale(0.5); opacity: 0; }
            100% { transform: scale(1);   opacity: 1; }
        }

        /* =========================================
           Responsive
           ========================================= */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .sidebar { display: none; }
            .main-content { padding: 20px; }
        }
    </style>
</head>

    <!-- ============ 平假名 ============ -->
    <section id="hiragana" class="tab-section">

            </div>
            <div class="kana-toggle-bar">

            </div>
            <div class="tip-box">💡 記憶小撇步：先大聲說出諧音，再想像圖案。例如「あ (a) → 啊！有一個人在張嘴呼救 あ」</div>

            <button class="sub-tab-btn" onclick="switchSubTab('kata-stroke', this)">✍️ 筆順教學</button>
            <button class="sub-tab-btn" onclick="switchSubTab('kata-mnemo', this)">🧠 對比記憶法</button>

    <!-- ============ 音的分類 ============ -->
    <section id="sounds" class="tab-section">
        <h2 class="section-header">🔊 音的分類系統</h2>

        <div class="lesson-intro green">
            <h2>日文的六大音型</h2>
            <p>掌握五十音之後，理解「音的分類規則」是拓展詞彙量的關鍵。每種音型都對應特定的書寫規則，從清音出發，一層一層解鎖。</p>
        </div>

        <div class="sound-cards-grid">
            <!-- 清音 -->
            <div class="sound-card seion">
                <h3>① 清音（せいおん）</h3>
                <p>基礎假名，無濁點，五十音的主體。共五十個（あいうえお為五母音，餘為子音＋母音組合）。</p>
                <div class="kana-sample-row">
                    <span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('か')">か</span>
                    <span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('さ')">さ</span>
                    <span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('た')">た</span>
                    <span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('な')">な</span>
                    <span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('は')">は</span>
                    <span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('ま')">ま</span>
                    <span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('ら')">ら</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 濁音 -->
            <div class="sound-card dakuten">
                <h3>② 濁音（だくおん）</h3>
                <p>在清音右上角加上「濁點 ゛」，發音由清轉濁。僅限 か・さ・た・は 行可以加濁點。</p>
                <div class="kana-sample-row">
                    <div class="kana-pair"><span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('か')">か</span><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('が')">が</span></div>
                    <div class="kana-pair"><span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('さ')">さ</span><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('ざ')">ざ</span></div>
                    <div class="kana-pair"><span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('た')">た</span><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('だ')">だ</span></div>
                    <div class="kana-pair"><span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('は')">は</span><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('ば')">ば</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- 半濁音 -->
            <div class="sound-card handaku">
                <h3>③ 半濁音（はんだくおん）</h3>
                <p>在 は 行右上角加上「半濁點 ゜」（小圓圈），發「p」音。是日文中最少的一組，只有5個。</p>
                <div class="kana-sample-row">
                    <div class="kana-pair"><span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('は')">は</span><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('ぱ')">ぱ</span></div>
                    <div class="kana-pair"><span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('ひ')">ひ</span><span class="arrow">→</span><span class="kana-sample" onclick="speak('ぴ')">ぴ</span></div>

function speak(text) {
    if (!window.speechSynthesis) return;
    window.speechSynthesis.cancel();
    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
    u.lang = 'ja-JP';
    u.rate = 0.85;
    const voices = window.speechSynthesis.getVoices();
    const ja = voices.find(v => v.lang === 'ja-JP') || voices.find(v => v.lang.startsWith('ja'));
    if (ja) u.voice = ja;
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(u);
}

    window.speechSynthesis.getVoices();
}

function buildKanaTable(rows, tbodyId, prefix) {
    const tbody = document.getElementById(tbodyId);
    if (!tbody) return;
    rows.forEach(row => {
        const tr = document.createElement('tr');
        const th = document.createElement('th');
        th.style.background = '#F9F8F6';
        th.style.color = 'var(--text-light)';
        th.style.fontSize = '0.8rem';
        th.textContent = row.label;
        tr.appendChild(th);
        row.cells.forEach(cell => {
            const td = document.createElement('td');
            if (!cell) {
                td.style.background = 'transparent';
                tr.appendChild(td);
                return;
            }
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.className = 'kana-cell';
            div.innerHTML = `<span class="kana-jp">${cell.jp}</span><span class="kana-rom">${cell.rom}</span><span class="kana-hint">${cell.emoji} ${cell.hint}</span>`;
            div.addEventListener('click', () => {
                speak(cell.jp);
                div.classList.toggle('flipped');
            });
            td.appendChild(div);
            tr.appendChild(td);
        });
        tbody.appendChild(tr);
    });
}

function buildStrokeSelector(rows, selectorId, demoId) {

        });

function renderStroke(kana, demo) {
    const data = strokeData[kana];
    if (!data) {
        demo.innerHTML = `<div style="color:var(--text-light); padding:20px;">「${kana}」的動態筆順即將推出，敬請期待！</div>`;
        return;
    }
    demo.innerHTML = '';

    // Canvas
    const canvasWrap = document.createElement('div');
    canvasWrap.className = 'stroke-canvas';
    const bigChar = document.createElement('div');
    bigChar.className = 'stroke-big-char';
    bigChar.textContent = kana;
    canvasWrap.appendChild(bigChar);

    const svg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','svg');
    svg.setAttribute('viewBox','0 0 160 160');
    svg.classList.add('stroke-anim-svg');

    // Draw strokes with animation
    data.strokes.forEach((s, i) => {
        const path = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','path');
        path.setAttribute('d', s.path);
        path.classList.add('stroke-path');
        path.style.animationDelay = (i * 0.7) + 's';

        // Measure path length after append
        setTimeout(() => {
            try {
                const len = path.getTotalLength ? path.getTotalLength() : 300;
                path.style.strokeDasharray = len;
                path.style.strokeDashoffset = len;
                path.classList.add('anim-stroke');
            } catch(e) {
                path.classList.add('anim-stroke');
            }
        }, 50);

        // Number label at start
        const startX = parseFloat(s.path.match(/M\s*([\d.]+)/)?.[1] || 80);
        const startY = parseFloat(s.path.match(/M\s*[\d.]+\s+([\d.]+)/)?.[1] || 80);
        const text = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','text');
        text.setAttribute('x', startX - 8);
        text.setAttribute('y', startY - 4);
        text.setAttribute('class','stroke-number');
        text.textContent = i + 1;
        text.style.opacity = 0;
        text.style.transition = 'opacity 0.3s';
        setTimeout(() => { text.style.opacity = 1; }, i * 700 + 400);

        svg.appendChild(path);
        svg.appendChild(text);
    });

    canvasWrap.appendChild(svg);
    demo.appendChild(canvasWrap);

    // Info panel
    const info = document.createElement('div');
    info.className = 'stroke-info';
    info.innerHTML = `
        <h4>${kana}</h4>
        <span class="rom-badge">${(strokeData[kana]?.strokes ? 
            (hiraRows.concat(kataRows).flatMap(r=>r.cells).find(c=>c&&c.jp===kana)||{rom:''}).rom : '')}</span>
        <ul class="stroke-steps">
            ${data.strokes.map((s,i)=>`<li><span class="stroke-step-num">${i+1}</span>${s.desc}</li>`).join('')}
        </ul>
        <button class="replay-btn" onclick="renderStroke('${kana}', document.getElementById('${demo.id}'))">↺ 重播動畫</button>
    `;
    demo.appendChild(info);
}

function buildPitchShowcase() {
    const container = document.getElementById('pitchShowcase');
    if (!container) return;

        card.className = 'accent-card';

            <div style="display:flex; gap:20px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:12px;">
                ${buildPitchDiagramHTML(item.pattern1, item.meaning1, item.label1)}
                ${buildPitchDiagramHTML(item.pattern2, item.meaning2, item.label2)}
            </div>
        `;
        container.appendChild(card);

function buildPitchDiagramHTML(pattern, meaning, label) {
    const w = 50;
    const highY = 10, lowY = 45, total = pattern.length;
    const svgW = total * w + 20;
    const svgH = 70;

    let circles = '', lines = '';
    pattern.forEach((m, i) => {
        const cx = 20 + i * w;
        const cy = m.high ? highY : lowY;
        circles += `<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="6" fill="${m.high ? '#2C3E50' : 'white'}" stroke="#2C3E50" stroke-width="2.5"/>`;
        if (i < pattern.length - 1) {
            const nx = 20 + (i+1) * w;
            const ny = pattern[i+1].high ? highY : lowY;
            lines += `<line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy}" x2="${nx}" y2="${ny}" stroke="#2C3E50" stroke-width="2"/>`;
        }
    });

    return `<div style="text-align:center; flex:1; min-width:130px;">
        <div style="font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--text-light); margin-bottom:6px;">${meaning}</div>
        <svg viewBox="0 0 ${svgW} ${svgH}" width="${svgW}" height="${svgH}" style="overflow:visible;">
            ${lines}${circles}
        </svg>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:4px; justify-content:center; margin-top:4px;">
        </div>
        <span class="pitch-label">${label}</span>
        <br>
        <button class="pitch-listen-btn" onclick="speak('${pattern.map((_,i)=>i).length > 0 ? '' : ''}'); speak(document.createTextNode ? '${meaning.replace(/[^あ-ん]/g,'').slice(0,4)}' : '')">🔊 聆聽</button>
    </div>`;
}

function loadGreetingQ() {
    if (greetIdx >= shuffledGreetQuiz.length) {
        greetIdx = 0;
        shuffledGreetQuiz = [...greetingQuiz].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
    }
    greetAnswered = false;
    const q = shuffledGreetQuiz[greetIdx];
    document.getElementById('greetSituation').textContent = q.situation;
    document.getElementById('greetQuestion').textContent = q.question;
    document.getElementById('greetFeedback').textContent = '';
    document.getElementById('greetNextBtn').classList.remove('show');

    const optContainer = document.getElementById('greetOptions');
    optContainer.innerHTML = '';
    [...q.options].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5).forEach(opt => {
        const btn = document.createElement('button');
        btn.className = 'quiz-opt-btn';
        btn.textContent = opt;
        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (greetAnswered) return;
            greetAnswered = true;
            greetTotal++;
            if (opt === q.answer) {
                greetScore++;
                btn.classList.add('correct');
                document.getElementById('greetFeedback').innerHTML = `✅ 正確！${q.explain}`;
                document.getElementById('greetFeedback').style.color = 'var(--matcha-green)';
                speak(q.answer);
            } else {
                btn.classList.add('wrong');
                document.getElementById('greetFeedback').innerHTML = `❌ 答案是「${q.answer}」。${q.explain}`;
                document.getElementById('greetFeedback').style.color = 'var(--accent-red)';
                // Show correct
                optContainer.querySelectorAll('.quiz-opt-btn').forEach(b => {
                    if (b.textContent === q.answer) b.classList.add('correct');
                    else if (b !== btn) { b.style.opacity = '0.45'; b.disabled = true; }
                });
            }
            document.getElementById('greetScore').textContent = `${greetScore} / ${greetTotal}`;
            const pct = Math.min((greetScore / Math.max(greetTotal, 1)) * 100, 100);
            document.getElementById('greetBar').style.width = pct + '%';
            document.getElementById('greetNextBtn').classList.add('show');
        });
        optContainer.appendChild(btn);
    });
    greetIdx++;
}

loadGreetingQ();

// ==============================================
// 外來語問答
// ==============================================

let lwScore = 0, lwTotal = 0, lwAnswered = false;
let lwIdx = 0;
const shuffledLW = [...loanwordQuiz].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);

function loadLoanword() {
    if (lwIdx >= shuffledLW.length) lwIdx = 0;
    lwAnswered = false;
    const q = shuffledLW[lwIdx];
    document.getElementById('lwQuestion').textContent = q.kata;
    document.getElementById('lwFeedback').textContent = '';
    document.getElementById('lwNextBtn').classList.remove('show');

    const optContainer = document.getElementById('lwOptions');
    optContainer.innerHTML = '';
    [...q.options].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5).forEach(opt => {
        const btn = document.createElement('button');
        btn.className = 'quiz-opt-btn';
        btn.textContent = opt;
        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (lwAnswered) return;
            lwAnswered = true;
            lwTotal++;
            if (opt === q.answer) {
                lwScore++;
                btn.classList.add('correct');
                document.getElementById('lwFeedback').innerHTML = `✅ 正確！${q.kata} = ${q.answer}`;
                document.getElementById('lwFeedback').style.color = 'var(--matcha-green)';
                speak(q.kata);
            } else {
                btn.classList.add('wrong');
                document.getElementById('lwFeedback').innerHTML = `❌ 答案是「${q.answer}」。`;
                document.getElementById('lwFeedback').style.color = 'var(--accent-red)';
                optContainer.querySelectorAll('.quiz-opt-btn').forEach(b => {
                    if (b.textContent === q.answer) b.classList.add('correct');
                    else if (b !== btn) { b.style.opacity='0.45'; b.disabled=true; }
                });
            }
            document.getElementById('lwScore').textContent = `${lwScore} / ${lwTotal}`;
            const pct = Math.min((lwScore / Math.max(lwTotal,1)) * 100, 100);
            document.getElementById('lwBar').style.width = pct + '%';
            document.getElementById('lwNextBtn').classList.add('show');
        });
        optContainer.appendChild(btn);
    });
    lwIdx++;
}

loadLoanword();

</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>

    <title>階段三：進階期 | 複雜句型與社會議題初探</title>
    <style>
        /* =========================================
           1. 全域變數與和風簡約色彩設定 (Modern Zen)
           ========================================= */
        :root {
            --bg-washi: #F9F8F6;       /* 溫暖的灰白色（和紙質感底色） */
            --primary-blue: #2C3E50;   /* 知性深藍（主要視覺、語法區） */
            --matcha-green: #6B8E23;   /* 抹茶綠（歷史、文化、社會區） */
            --accent-red: #E74C3C;     /* 朱紅（點綴、警示、按鈕） */
            --text-dark: #333333;      /* 深灰內文 */
            --text-light: #7F8C8D;     /* 淺灰副標題 */
            --sidebar-bg: #FFFFFF;     /* 側邊欄純白底色 */
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        body {
            font-family: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, "PingFang TC", "Microsoft JhengHei", sans-serif;
            background-color: var(--bg-washi);

            display: flex;
            height: 100vh;

            background-size: 20px 20px;
        }

        /* =========================================
           2. 側邊欄 (Sidebar) 設計
           ========================================= */
        .sidebar {
            width: 260px;
            background-color: var(--sidebar-bg);
            box-shadow: 2px 0 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03);

            flex-direction: column;
            padding: 30px 20px;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .sidebar-title {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            padding-bottom: 15px;
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--bg-washi);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;

            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 15px;

            border: none;
            text-align: left;
            padding: 15px 20px;
            font-size: 1.05rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--text-light);
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .nav-btn:hover {
            background-color: var(--bg-washi);
            color: var(--primary-blue);
        }

        /* 被選中的側邊欄按鈕狀態 */
        .nav-btn.active {
            background-color: var(--primary-blue);
            color: #ffffff;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(44, 62, 80, 0.2);
        }

        /* =========================================
           3. 右側主要內容區 (Main Content)
           ========================================= */
        .main-content {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 40px 50px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }

        /* 控制區塊顯示與隱藏 */
        .tab-section {
            display: none;
            animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease-in-out;
        }

        .tab-section.active {
            display: block;
        }

        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
            to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }

        /* 區塊大標題 */
        .section-header {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            border-left: 5px solid var(--accent-red);
            padding-left: 15px;
        }

        /* =========================================
           4. 現代卡片佈局 (Modern Cards)
           ========================================= */
        .card-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
            gap: 25px;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
        }

        .modern-card {
            background-color: #ffffff;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 25px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
            transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
            border-top: 4px solid var(--primary-blue);
        }

        /* 社會主題卡片改用抹茶綠邊框 */
        .modern-card.theme-card {
            border-top: 4px solid var(--matcha-green);
        }

        .modern-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
        }

        .card-title {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: var(--primary-blue);
        }
        
        .theme-card .card-title {
            color: var(--matcha-green);
        }

            color: var(--text-light);

            border-color: var(--accent-red);

    /* =========================================
           1-1 專屬樣式設定（嵌入補丁）
           ========================================= */
           .lesson-1-1 {
            max-width: 100%;

            color: var(--primary-blue);
            margin-top: 0;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
        }

        .grammar-cards-container {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
        }

        .grammar-card {
            background: #fff;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.03);
            border-top: 6px solid #ccc;
        }

        .grammar-card.group-3 { border-top-color: #E67E22; }
        .grammar-card.group-3 h3 { color: #E67E22; }
        .grammar-card.group-2 { border-top-color: #3498DB; }
        .grammar-card.group-2 h3 { color: #3498DB; }
        .grammar-card.group-1 { border-top-color: var(--matcha-green); }
        .grammar-card.group-1 h3 { color: var(--matcha-green); }

        .grammar-card h3 {
            margin-top: 0;
            font-size: 1.15rem;
            border-bottom: 1px dashed #eee;
            padding-bottom: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .grammar-card ul {
            padding-left: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }

        .alert-box {
            background-color: #FDEDEC;
            border-left: 4px solid var(--accent-red);
            padding: 10px 15px;
            margin-top: 15px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
        }

        .game-section {
            background-color: #fff;
            padding: 30px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            border: 2px dashed #BDC3C7;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02);
        }

        .game-section h3 {
            text-align: center;
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            margin-top: 0;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }

        .word-pool {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 12px;
            justify-content: center;
            min-height: 80px;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            padding: 15px;
            background: var(--bg-washi);
            border-radius: 8px;
        }

        .draggable-word {
            background-color: #fff;
            border: 2px solid var(--primary-blue);
            color: var(--primary-blue);
            padding: 8px 18px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            cursor: grab;
            user-select: none;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 1.05rem;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
            transition: transform 0.1s;
        }

        .draggable-word:active { cursor: grabbing; transform: scale(0.95); }
        .draggable-word ruby { ruby-align: center; }
        .draggable-word rt { font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--text-light); }

        .drop-zones {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
        }

        .drop-zone {
            background-color: var(--bg-washi);
            border: 3px dashed #BDC3C7;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 20px 10px;
            min-height: 160px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .drop-zone-title {
            font-weight: bold;
            color: var(--text-light);
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .drop-zone.drag-over { background-color: #E8F8F5; border-color: #2ECC71; }
        .drop-zone.correct-flash { background-color: #D5F5E3; border-color: #27AE60; border-style: solid; }

        .shake-error {
            animation: shake 0.4s cubic-bezier(.36,.07,.19,.97) both;
            border-color: var(--accent-red) !important;
            background-color: #FDEDEC !important;
            color: var(--accent-red) !important;
        }

        @keyframes shake {
            10%, 90% { transform: translate3d(-2px, 0, 0); }
            20%, 80% { transform: translate3d(4px, 0, 0); }
            30%, 50%, 70% { transform: translate3d(-6px, 0, 0); }
            40%, 60% { transform: translate3d(6px, 0, 0); }
        }

        .drop-zone .draggable-word {
            cursor: default;
            box-shadow: none;
            border-color: #BDC3C7;
            background-color: #F8F9FA;
        }
    /* =========================================
           1-2 專屬樣式設定（嵌入補丁）
           ========================================= */
           .lesson-1-2 {
            max-width: 100%;
            margin: 40px auto 0 auto;
            border-top: 2px dashed #BDC3C7;
            padding-top: 40px;
        }

        .mnemonic-rule {
            background: #F9F8F6;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            border-left: 4px solid #6B8E23;
        }

        .mnemonic-rule h4 {
            margin: 0 0 5px 0;
            color: #6B8E23;
        }

        /* 表格樣式 */
        .table-container {

            margin-bottom: 40px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);

        .conjugation-table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
            background: #fff;

            padding: 15px;

            border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
        }

        .conjugation-table tr:hover {
            background: #F8F9FA;
        }

        .conjugation-table .highlight {

            border-left: 5px solid #8E44AD; /* 政治體制使用紫色系 */
        }

        .lesson-intro-23 h2 {
            color: #8E44AD;
            margin-top: 0;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            font-size: 1.6rem;
        }

        .poli-term {
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #2C3E50;
            background-color: #E8ECEF;
            padding: 2px 6px;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        /* 國家機器運作線遊戲區塊 */
        .poli-game-board {
            background: #F4F6F7;
            border-radius: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #BDC3C7;
            padding: 20px;
            margin-top: 20px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            user-select: none;
            touch-action: none; /* 防止手機滑動干擾拖曳 */
        }

        .poli-stage {
            height: 450px;
            position: relative;
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: inset 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
            background-image: linear-gradient(#f0f0f0 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, #f0f0f0 1px, transparent 1px);
            background-size: 20px 20px;
        }

        .poli-node {
            position: absolute;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            z-index: 10;
            cursor: grab;
        }
        
        .poli-node:active { cursor: grabbing; }

        .poli-avatar {
            width: 70px;
            height: 70px;
            background: #fff;
            border: 3px solid #34495E;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 2rem;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
            transition: transform 0.2s;
            position: relative;
        }

        .poli-node:hover .poli-avatar { transform: scale(1.1); }
        .poli-node.connected .poli-avatar { border-color: #2ECC71; background: #E8F8F5; }

        .poli-name {
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #2C3E50;
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
            padding: 4px 10px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
            text-align: center;
        }

        /* 節點固定位置 */
        #node-kokumin { bottom: 20px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); }
        #node-giin { top: 200px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); }
        #node-shusho { top: 20px; left: 30%; transform: translateX(-50%); }
        #node-tenno { top: 20px; right: 10%; border-color: #F39C12; }
        
        #node-tenno .poli-avatar { border-color: #F39C12; }

        /* SVG 畫線區 */
        .poli-svg {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%; height: 100%;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 5;
        }

        .poli-line {
            stroke-width: 6;
            stroke-linecap: round;
        }

        .poli-line.temp { stroke: #BDC3C7; stroke-dasharray: 10; }
        .poli-line.solid { stroke: #2ECC71; }
        
        /* 選擇動詞的彈出視窗 */
        .verb-modal {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%; left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
            z-index: 100;
            text-align: center;
            display: none;
            border: 2px solid #3498DB;
            width: 80%;
            max-width: 300px;
        }

        .verb-modal h4 { margin: 0 0 15px 0; color: #2C3E50; }
        
        .verb-btn {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            padding: 10px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            background: #fff;
            border: 2px solid #BDC3C7;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #34495E;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        .verb-btn:hover { background: #3498DB; color: #fff; border-color: #3498DB; }

        /* 憲法警告視窗 */
        .warning-modal {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%; left: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            background: #FDEDEC;
            padding: 25px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(231,76,60,0.4);
            z-index: 100;
            text-align: center;
            display: none;
            border: 3px solid #E74C3C;
            width: 85%;
            max-width: 350px;
            animation: shake 0.4s;
        }

        .warning-modal h3 { margin: 0 0 10px 0; color: #E74C3C; }
        .warning-modal p { color: #C0392B; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 15px;}
        
        .close-warning {
            background: #E74C3C; color: #fff; border: none;
            padding: 8px 20px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer;
        }
    /* =========================================
           4-1 & 4-2 實戰總驗收樣式（嵌入補丁）

        .asm-quiz-pane {

        /* 4-1 選擇題樣式 */
        .mcq-option {

            color: #2C3E50;
        }

        .mcq-option:hover { border-color: #BDC3C7; background: #f1f2f6; }
        .mcq-option.correct { border-color: #2ECC71; background: #D5F5E3; color: #27AE60; pointer-events: none; font-weight: bold;}
        .mcq-option.wrong { border-color: var(--accent-red); background: #FDEDEC; color: var(--accent-red); animation: shake 0.4s; }

        .explanation-box {
            display: none;
            background: #FEF9E7;
            border-left: 4px solid #F1C40F;
            padding: 15px;
            margin-top: 15px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            color: #D35400;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease;
        }

        /* 4-2 克漏字樣式 */
        .cloze-sentence {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            line-height: 2;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }

        .cloze-input {
            border: none;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #34495E;
            background: transparent;
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: #3498DB;
            text-align: center;
            width: 180px;
            outline: none;
            font-weight: bold;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }

        .cloze-input:focus { border-bottom-color: #3498DB; }
        .cloze-input.correct { border-bottom-color: #2ECC71; color: #27AE60; pointer-events: none; }
        .cloze-input.wrong { border-bottom-color: var(--accent-red); color: var(--accent-red); animation: shake 0.4s; }
        
        .cloze-hint { color: #7F8C8D; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 5px; }

        /* 隱藏非作用中的測驗內容 */
        .asm-content { display: none; }
        .asm-content.active { display: block; animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease; }
    /* =========================================
           子分頁橫向按鈕外觀與隱藏控制
           ========================================= */
           .sub-tabs-container {
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;

             分頁 1：核心語法深化 (預設顯示)
             ===================================== -->
        <section id="grammar" class="tab-section active">
        <!-- 1. 在這裡直接貼上橫向導覽列 -->
        <div class="sub-tabs-container">
            <button class="sub-tab-btn active" onclick="switchSubTab('sub-1-1', this)">1-1 三大家族</button>
            <button class="sub-tab-btn" onclick="switchSubTab('sub-1-2', this)">1-2 て・た形大魔王</button>
            <button class="sub-tab-btn" onclick="switchSubTab('sub-1-3', this)">1-3 ない・辭書形</button>
            <button class="sub-tab-btn" onclick="switchSubTab('sub-1-4', this)">1-4 授受動詞</button>
        </div>
            <h2 class="section-header">核心語法深化</h2>
            <div class="card-grid">
                <!-- 卡片 1-1 -->
                <div id="sub-1-1" class="sub-tab-content active">
                <div class="lesson-1-1">
                    <div class="lesson-intro">
                        <h2>掌握日文的萬能鑰匙：動詞三大家族</h2>
                        <p>「為什麼日文動詞變化這麼多？其實，日文所有的動詞都可以被精準地分為『三個家族』。只要我們能從動詞的<strong>『辭書形（也就是字典上的長相，也就是原型）』</strong>一眼看穿它屬於哪一個家族，所有的變化規則都會變得超級簡單！我們從人數最少的家族開始認識吧！」</p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="grammar-cards-container">
                        <div class="grammar-card group-3">
                            <h3>家族 III：不規則動詞</h3>
                            <p><strong>判斷秘訣：</strong>完全不講武德，沒有規則，直接背下來就對了。人數最少，只有兩個！</p>
                            <ul>
                                <li><strong>する</strong> (suru)：做...</li>
                                <li><strong>来る</strong> (kuru)：來...</li>
                            </ul>
                            <div style="background: #FEF9E7; padding: 10px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 10px;">
                                💡 <strong>擴充小提示：</strong>只要是「名詞 + する」組成的動詞，全部都屬於第三家族喔！（例如：勉強する、仕事する、買い物する）。
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="grammar-card group-2">
                            <h3>家族 II：上下一段動詞</h3>
                            <p><strong>判斷秘訣：</strong>結尾一定是「る」，而且「る」前面的那個音，一定落在<strong>「い段」</strong>或<strong>「え段」</strong>。</p>
                            <p><strong>公式：</strong> <code>[い段音 / え段音] + る</code></p>
                            <ul>
                                <li><strong>食べる</strong> (ta-be-ru)：前一個音「べ(be)」屬え段 ➡️ 第 II 類</li>
                                <li><strong>見る</strong> (mi-ru)：前一個音「み(mi)」屬い段 ➡️ 第 II 類</li>
                                <li><strong>起きる</strong> (o-ki-ru)：前一個音「き(ki)」屬い段 ➡️ 第 II 類</li>
                            </ul>
                        </div>

                        <div class="grammar-card group-1">
                            <h3>家族 I：五段動詞</h3>
                            <p><strong>判斷秘訣：</strong>只要不符合上述兩個家族的，通通丟進這裡！人數最多、結尾最多樣。</p>
                            <ul>
                                <li>結尾<strong>不是「る」</strong>的動詞，100% 都是第一類！（例：行く、飲む、話す、待つ）</li>
                                <li>結尾雖然是「る」，但前面的音落在<strong>「あ段、う段、お段」</strong>（例：わかる wa-ka-ru）。</li>
                            </ul>
                            <div class="alert-box">
                                ⚠️ <strong>終極陷阱題（披著羊皮的狼）：</strong><br>
                                長得完全符合「第 II 類」規則，但其實是第 I 類！考試必考特例：<br>
                                <strong>帰る</strong>(回家)、<strong>入る</strong>(進入)、<strong>切る</strong>(剪)、<strong>知る</strong>(知道)
                            </div>
                        </div>

                    <div class="lesson-intro">
                        <h2>打通日語任督二脈：て形與た形變化</h2>
                        <p>「恭喜你來到日語學習最重要的里程碑！為什麼我們一定要學『て形』與『た形』？<br>
                        因為學會了它們，你不只能夠把句子連在一起，還能解鎖超多實用句型，例如：『正在做...（～ている）』、『請做...（～てください）』，以及表達過去發生的事『做了...（～た）』。<br>
                        好消息是：<strong>て形與た形的變化規則完全一樣！</strong> 只要記住一組口訣，就能一次學會兩種變化。我們按照家族，由簡入深來破解它吧！」</p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="grammar-cards-container">
                        
                        <div class="grammar-card" style="border-top-color: #3498DB;">
                            <h3>1. 最輕鬆的 第三類 與 第二類（直接變化！）</h3>
                            
                            <div class="mnemonic-rule">
                                <h4>📦 第三類（不規則動詞）</h4>
                                <p>請直接死背，沒有理由。</p>
                                <ul>
                                    <li><strong>する</strong> ➡️ して / した</li>
                                    <li><strong>来る（くる）</strong> ➡️ 来て（きて） / 来た（きた）</li>
                                </ul>
                            </div>

                            <div class="mnemonic-rule">
                                <h4>📦 第二類（上下一段動詞）</h4>
                                <p>最乖的家族。<strong>規則：去「る」加「て / た」。</strong></p>
                                <ul>
                                    <li>食べる ➡️ 食べて / 食べた</li>
                                    <li>見る ➡️ 見見て / 見た</li>
                                </ul>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="grammar-card" style="border-top-color: var(--accent-red);">
                            <h3>2. 第一類（五段動詞）：洗腦口訣大挑戰</h3>
                            <p>第一類動詞的變化最複雜，會根據「辭書形」最後一個假名的發音產生<strong>音便</strong>。請跟著口訣一起唸：</p>
                            
                            <div class="mnemonic-rule">
                                <h4>🎶 規則一：促音便（跳躍的停頓）</h4>
                                <p><strong>口訣：</strong> 結尾是 う、つ、る ➡️ 去掉加 <strong>って / った</strong></p>
                                <p>範例：買う ➡️ 買って、待つ ➡️ 待慢、作る ➡️ 作って</p>
                            </div>

                            <div class="mnemonic-rule">
                                <h4>🎶 規則二：撥音便（鼻音的共鳴）</h4>
                                <p><strong>口訣：</strong> 結尾是 む、ぶ、ぬ ➡️ 去掉加 <strong>んで / んだ</strong></p>
                                <p>範例：飲む ➡️ 飲んで、遊ぶ ➡️ 遊んで、死ぬ ➡️ 死んで</p>
                            </div>

                            <div class="mnemonic-rule">
                                <h4>🎶 規則三：イ音便（母音的滑音）</h4>
                                <p><strong>口訣：</strong> 結尾是 く ➡️ <strong>いて / いた</strong>，結尾是 ぐ ➡️ <strong>いで / いだ</strong>（點點要保留！）</p>
                                <p>範例：書く ➡️ 書いて、泳ぐ ➡️ 泳いで</p>
                            </div>

                            <div class="mnemonic-rule">
                                <h4>🎶 規則四：そのまま（直接加）</h4>
                                <p><strong>口訣：</strong> 結尾是 す ➡️ <strong>して / した</strong></p>
                                <p>範例：話す ➡️ 話して</p>
                            </div>

                            <div class="alert-box">
                                ⚠️ <strong>唯一的超級例外：行く（いく）</strong><br>
                                按照規則應該是「いいて」，但日本人覺得太難唸，所以特別規定它要變成促音 ➡️ <strong>行って / 行った</strong>。這題絕對必考！
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <h3 style="color: var(--primary-blue); margin-bottom: 15px;">📋 動詞變化對照表</h3>

                <div class="lesson-1-3">
                    <div class="lesson-intro">
                        <h2>融入日本社會的必備句型：規則、義務與能力</h2>
                        <p>「學會了て形與た形，接下來我們要掌握日本社會運作的核心！<br>
                        日本人非常注重公共場合的規矩，當你要表達『請不要這麼做』或是『必須這麼做』時，就會用到動詞的<strong>『ない形（否定形）』</strong>。<br>
                        而當你想展現自己的專長，告訴別人『我能夠做到什麼』時，就會用到最原汁原味的<strong>『辭書形（原型）』</strong>。讓我們一起破解這些生活情境吧！」</p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="grammar-cards-container">
                        
                        <div class="grammar-card" style="border-top-color: #3498DB;">
                            <h3>1. 拒絕與禁止的基礎：ない形</h3>
                            <p>要表達「不...」，必須把動詞變成「ない形」。規律非常明確：</p>
                            
                            <div class="rule-block">
                                <h4>第 III 類（不規則）</h4>
                                <ul>
                                    <li>する ➡️ <strong>しない</strong>（不做）</li>
                                    <li>来る（くる） ➡️ <strong>来ない</strong>（こない / 不來） <small style="color:var(--accent-red);">⚠️ 注意發音改變！</small></li>
                                </ul>
                            </div>

                            <div class="rule-block">
                                <h4>第 II 類（上下一段）</h4>
                                <p style="margin-top:0; margin-bottom:5px; font-size:0.9rem;">直接去「る」加「ない」</p>
                                <ul>
                                    <li>食べる ➡️ <strong>食べない</strong>（不吃）</li>
                                    <li>見る ➡️ <strong>見ない</strong>（不看）</li>
                                </ul>
                            </div>

                            <div class="rule-block">
                                <h4>第 I 類（五段）</h4>
                                <p style="margin-top:0; margin-bottom:5px; font-size:0.9rem;">將結尾的「う段音」改成「あ段音」+ ない</p>
                                <ul>
                                    <li>話す（はな<span class="highlight-blue">す</span>） ➡️ 話さ（はな<span class="highlight-red">さ</span>）+ <strong>ない</strong></li>
                                    <li>書く（か<span class="highlight-blue">く</span>） ➡️ 書か（か<span class="highlight-red">か</span>）+ <strong>ない</strong></li>
                                </ul>
                            </div>

                            <div class="alert-box">
                                ⚠️ <strong>唯一例外：</strong>結尾是「う」的，不能變成「快」，要變成「わ」！<br>
                                買う（か<span class="highlight-blue">う</span>） ➡️ 買わ（か<span class="highlight-red">わ</span>）+ <strong>ない</strong>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="grammar-card" style="border-top-color: var(--matcha-green);">
                            <h3>2. 必須掌握的三大王牌句型</h3>
                            <p>學會變化後，直接套入這三個超級實用的句型模組：</p>

                            <div class="rule-block" style="border-left: 4px solid var(--accent-red);">
                                <h4>🛑 規則一：～ないでください</h4>
                                <p><strong>意思：</strong>請不要...<br>
                                <strong>接續：</strong>ない形 + でください<br>
                                <strong>情境：</strong>委婉但堅定地制止別人的行為。<br>
                                <span style="color:#7F8C8D;">範例：ここで写真をとらないでください。</span></p>
                            </div>

                            <div class="rule-block" style="border-left: 4px solid #F39C12;">
                                <h4>❗ 規則二：～なければなりません</h4>
                                <p><strong>意思：</strong>必須... / 不做不行<br>
                                <strong>接續：</strong>拿掉ない形的「い」，加上「ければなりません」<br>
                                <strong>情境：</strong>表達強烈的義務或規定（雙重否定表肯定）。<br>
                                <span style="color:#7F8C8D;">範例：明日、テストがありから、勉強しなければなりません。</span></p>
                            </div>

                            <div class="rule-block" style="border-left: 4px solid #3498DB;">
                                <h4>✨ 規則三：～ことができます</h4>
                                <p><strong>意思：</strong>能夠... / 會...<br>
                                <strong>接續：</strong>辭書形（原型） + ことができます<br>
                                <strong>情境：</strong>表達具備某種能力，或在某個場合允許做某事。<br>
                                <span style="color:#7F8C8D;">範例：私は日本語を話すことができます。</span></p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                <div id="sub-1-4" class="sub-tab-content">
                <div class="lesson-1-4">
                    <div class="lesson-intro">
                        <h2>日本人眼中的世界：誰給誰？誰幫誰？（授受動詞）</h2>
                        <p>「為什麼日文的『給』這麼複雜？因為對日本人來說，動作不只是動作，還包含了<strong>『恩惠的流動』</strong>與<strong>『內外親疏的關係』</strong>。<br>
                        在日文裡，我們必須透過動詞來明確標示：這個恩惠是『往外送出去』，還是『往我這裡送進來』？只要掌握『主詞是誰』以及『箭頭指向誰』，你就能擁有一顆真正的日語腦！」</p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="grammar-cards-container">
                        
                        <div class="grammar-card group-ageru">
                            <h3>↗️ 箭頭向外飛：あげる</h3>
                            <p><strong>核心觀念：</strong>恩惠的箭頭是「遠離自己」的。<br>
                            <strong>主詞：</strong>必須是「給予者」。</p>
                            <div class="rule-block">
                                <strong>公式：</strong> A は B に 物 を あげる。<br>
                                <span style="color:#7F8C8D;">範例：私は 山田さんに 傘を あげました。（我給山田傘 / 別人給別人）</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="grammar-card group-kureru">
                            <h3>↙️ 箭頭向內飛：くれる</h3>
                            <p><strong>核心觀念：</strong>最容易錯的字！當恩惠的箭頭「朝向我」飛來時，絕對不能用 あげる，必須用專屬的 くれる。<br>
                            <strong>主詞：</strong>必須是「給我東西的那個人」。</p>
                            <div class="rule-block">
                                <strong>公式：</strong> A（別人） は 私 に 物 を くれる。<br>
                                <span style="color:#7F8C8D;">範例：山田さんは 私に 時計を くれました。（山田給了我手錶）</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="grammar-card group-morau">
                            <h3>🎯 接收者主角：もらう</h3>
                            <p><strong>核心觀念：</strong>動作事件沒有改變，但我們把「攝影機」綁在「收禮物的人」身上。<br>
                            <strong>主詞：</strong>必須是「接收者（通常是我）」。</p>
                            <div class="rule-block">
                                <strong>公式：</strong> 私 は A（別人） に（或 から） 物 を もらう。<br>
                                <span style="color:#7F8C8D;">範例：私は 山田さんに 時計を もらいました。（我從山田那裡得到了手錶）</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                    <div class="grammar-cards-container">

                            <h3>🎯 句型：～に由来する</h3>
                            <p><strong>意思：</strong>起源於～ / 由來是～ 【N3重點】</p>
                            <p><strong>公式：</strong> 【現在的事物】は ➕ 【過去的出處】に由来する</p>
                            <div style="background: #FDEDEC; padding: 10px; border-radius: 4px; border-left: 3px solid #E74C3C; font-size: 0.95rem;">
                                <strong>盲點破解：</strong><br>
                                台灣學生最容易把主從關係搞反！「現在的留在句首當主詞（は），古老的起源放在後面（に）」。<br>
                                ⭕ 京都は 平安京に 由來する。<br>
                                ❌ 平安京は 京都に 由來する。（時空倒錯！）
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="grammar-card" style="border-top-color: #F39C12;">
                            <h3>🧳 歷史名詞：都（みやこ）</h3>

                            <p><strong>文化背景：</strong> 在日文中，「都」指的是「天皇居住的城市」。在長達千年的歷史中，對日本人而言，真正的「都」指的就是京都（平安京）。</p>

                            <p style="color: #7F8C8D; font-size: 0.95rem;">例句：傳統と現代が交差する町。</p>

                        <h2>2-2 職場求生術：不是蔬菜的「ほうれんそう」？</h2>
                        <p>「踏入日本企業，有一種『蔬菜』你絕對不能不認識！『ほうれんそう』聽起來像是菠菜，但在日本職場，它卻是攸關你個人信用與工作成敗的最核心規則。這節課，我們將帶你認識日本商務文化中最基礎的人際關係，並學會如何在緊急時刻，用最正確的日文句型向上司求救或向客戶致歉！」</p>

                        <div class="reading-jp">
                            <p class="jp-paragraph" data-start="0" data-end="20">
                              日本の<ruby>会社<rt>かいしゃ</rt></ruby>で<ruby>働<rt>はたら</rt></ruby>くとき、一番<ruby>大切<rt>たいせつ</rt></ruby>なルールは「ほうれんそう」です。<ruby>野菜<rt>やさい</rt></ruby>の「ほうれん草」と<ruby>同<rt>おな</rt></ruby>じ<ruby>発音<rt>はつおん</rt></ruby>ですが、<ruby>意味<rt>いみ</rt></ruby>は<ruby>違<rt>ちが</rt></ruby>います。これは「<span class="hlt-hou vocab-term" data-reading="ほうこく (houkoku)" data-meaning="報告、向上回報" data-jlpt="N3"><ruby>報<rt>ほう</rt></ruby>告</span>（ほうこく）」、「<span class="hlt-ren vocab-term" data-reading="れんらく (renraku)" data-meaning="聯絡、通知相關人員" data-jlpt="N3"><ruby>連<rt>れん</rt></ruby>絡</span>（れんらく）」、「<span class="hlt-sou vocab-term" data-reading="そうだん (soudan)" data-meaning="商量、諮詢建議" data-jlpt="N3"><ruby>相<rt>そう</rt></ruby>談</span>（そうだん）」の３つの<ruby>言葉<rt>ことば</rt></ruby>の<ruby>頭文字<rt>かしらもじ</rt></ruby>です。
                            </p>
                            <p class="jp-paragraph" data-start="20" data-end="46">
                              仕事が<ruby>終<rt>お</rt></ruby>わったり、<ruby>問題<rt>もんだい</rt></ruby>が<ruby>起<rt>お</rt></ruby>きたりしたときは、すぐに<span class="vocab-term" data-reading="じょうし (joushi)" data-meaning="上司、主管" data-jlpt="N3">上司</span>に<span class="hlt-hou vocab-term" data-reading="ほうこく (houkoku)" data-meaning="報告、向上回報" data-jlpt="N3">報告</span>してください。<ruby>遅刻<rt>ちこく</rt></ruby>するときや<ruby>予定<rt>よてい</rt></ruby>が<ruby>変<rt>か</rt></ruby>わったときは、同僚や<span class="vocab-term" data-reading="とりひきさき (torihikisaki)" data-meaning="客戶、交易對象" data-jlpt="N2">取引先</span>に早く<span class="hlt-ren vocab-term" data-reading="れんらく (renraku)" data-meaning="聯絡、通知相關人員" data-jlpt="N3">連絡</span>しなければなりません。そして、仕事で<ruby>分<rt>わ</rt></ruby>からないことや<ruby>困<rt>こま</rt></ruby>ったことがあったら、<ruby>一人<rt>ひとり</rt></ruby>で<ruby>悩<rt>なや</rt></ruby>まないで、先輩に<span class="hlt-sou vocab-term" data-reading="そうだん (soudan)" data-meaning="商量、諮詢建議" data-jlpt="N3">相談</span>したほうがいいです。
