                        <div class="reading-zh">
                            在日本的公司工作時，最重要的規則是「報聯商（ほうれんそう）」。雖然和蔬菜的「菠菜」發音相同，但意思不一樣。這是「<span class="hlt-hou">報告</span>、<span class="hlt-ren">聯絡</span>、<span class="hlt-sou">商量</span>」三個詞的字首縮寫。<br><br>
                            工作結束或發生問題時，請立刻向上司報告。遲到或預定改變時，必須盡快向同事或客戶（交易對象）聯絡。還有，如果工作上有不懂或困擾的事情，請不要一個人煩惱，最好向原輩商量。<br><br>

                    <h3 style="color: #2C3E50; margin-bottom: 20px;">🔍 核心字詞與句型大解密</h3>
                    <div class="grammar-cards-container">
                        
                        <div class="grammar-card" style="border-top-color: #34495E;">
                            <h3>🤝 職場必備三大人際關係單字</h3>
                            <p>在日本職場中，對應不同的人，必須使用不同的溝通策略與敬語程度：</p>
                            <ul>
                                <li style="margin-bottom: 8px;"><strong>上司（じょうし）：</strong> 主管、上級。是你必須隨時「報告」進度與錯誤的對象。</li>
                                <li style="margin-bottom: 8px;"><strong>同僚（どうりょう）：</strong> 同事。與你職級相當，是變更行程時需要互相「連絡」的夥伴。</li>
                                <li style="margin-bottom: 8px;"><strong>取引先（とりひきさき）：</strong> 客戶、交易對象。外部的衣食父母，絕對不能對他們使用過於隨便的語氣。</li>
                            </ul>
                        </div>

                        <div class="grammar-card" style="border-top-color: #E74C3C;">
                            <h3>🎯 祈使句：～てください</h3>
                            <p><strong>意思：</strong>請...</p>
                            <p><strong>用法解析：</strong> 將動詞變化為「て形」後加上ください，用來指示或請求別人做某事。在職場中，常出現在上司對下屬的指示，或緊急狀況下的明確要求。</p>
                            <div style="background: #F9F8F6; padding: 10px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.95rem;">
                                <strong>範例：</strong>すぐに上司に報告し<strong>てください</strong>。（請立刻向上司報告。）
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="grammar-card" style="border-top-color: #3498DB;">
                            <h3>💡 建議句型：～たほうがいいです</h3>
                            <p><strong>意思：</strong>最好...</p>
                            <p><strong>用法解析：</strong> 將動詞變化為「た形（過去式）」後加上ほうがいいです。這是一種帶有客觀建議色彩的表達方式，用來提醒對方「這樣做比較好（不然可能會有不好的後果）」。</p>
                            <div style="background: #F9F8F6; padding: 10px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.95rem;">
                                <strong>範例：</strong>一人で悩まないで、先輩に相談し<strong>たほうがいいです</strong>。（不要一個人煩惱，最好找前輩商量。）

                        <p style="color: #7F8C8D; margin-bottom: 10px;">請根據突發狀況，連續做出三個正確決定！選錯會扣除職場信用（愛心）。</p>

                            <h3>📖 2-1 京都の由来と現代</h3>
                            日本の古い都といえば、京都です。京都という名前は、昔の「平安京」に由来します。平安時代、ここには天皇が住んでいました。約1200年の歴史があり、町を歩くと古いお寺や神社がたくさんあります。<br><br>
                            しかし、京都は古いだけの町ではありません。現代の京都には、新しいカフェや有名なIT企業もあります。歴史的な建物と現代の生活が交差する風景は、とても魅力的です。みなさんも、京都に行ったら、ぜひ古い文化と新しい文化を探してみてください。
                        </div>
                        <div id="art-2-2" class="asm-content">
                            <h3>📖 2-2 職場の「ほうれんそう」</h3>
                            日本の会社で働くとき、一番大切なルールは「ほうれんそう」です。野菜の「ほうれん草」と同じ発音ですが、意味は違います。これは「報告、連絡、相談」の３つの言葉の頭文字です。<br><br>
                            仕事が終わったり、問題が起きたりしたときは、すぐに上司に報告してください。遅刻するときや予定が変わったときは、同僚や取引先に早く連絡しなければなりません。そして、仕事で分からないことや困ったことがあったら、一人で悩まないで、先輩に相談したほうがいいです。<br><br>
                            「ほうれんそう」をしっかり行うことで、仕事がスムーズに進みます。
                        </div>
                        <div id="art-2-3" class="asm-content">
                            <h3>📖 2-3 象徴天皇と内閣</h3>
                            日本の政治について、少し学んでみましょう。現在の日本の憲法では、天皇は日本の「象徴」です。天皇は政治の決定権を持っていません。<br><br>
                            では、誰が日本の政治を決めるのでしょうか。それは「内閣」です。内閣のトップは内閣総理大臣（首相）です。首相は、国民が直接選ぶのではありません。まず、国民は選挙で国会議員を選びます。そして、国会の中で、議員たちが話し合って首相を決めます。<br><br>
                            ニュースで「国会」や「選挙」という言葉を聞いたら、誰が日本の未来を作っているのか、少し考えてみてください。
                        </div>

    <!-- =========================
    共用 Tooltip 容器（只放一次）

    <!-- 切換分頁的 JavaScript 邏輯 -->
    <script>
        function switchTab(tabId, clickedBtn) {
            // 1. 隱藏所有的內容區塊
            const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-section');
            sections.forEach(section => {
                section.classList.remove('active');
            });

            // 2. 移除所有側邊欄按鈕的 active 狀態
            const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-btn');
            buttons.forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('active');
            });

            // 3. 顯示被點擊的內容區塊，並將點擊的按鈕設為 active
            document.getElementById(tabId).classList.add('active');
            clickedBtn.classList.add('active');
        }
    // ==========================================
        // 1-1 遊戲資料庫與邏輯設定（嵌入補丁）
        // ==========================================

        const wordBank = [
            { id: "word-1", kanji: "飲む", kana: "の", target: "1" },
            { id: "word-2", kanji: "来る", kana: "く", target: "3" },
            { id: "word-3", kanji: "食べる", kana: "た", target: "2" },
            { id: "word-4", kanji: "話す", kana: "はな", target: "1" },
            { id: "word-5", kanji: "見る", kana: "み", target: "2" },
            { id: "word-6", kanji: "散步する", kana: "さんぽ", target: "3" },
            { id: "word-7", kanji: "分かる", kana: "わ", target: "1" },
            { id: "word-8", kanji: "帰る", kana: "かえ", target: "1" }, 
            { id: "word-9", kanji: "入る", kana: "はい", target: "1" }, 
            { id: "word-10", kanji: "する", kana: "す", target: "3" }
        ];

        // 建立免外部音效檔的網頁音效產生器 (Web Audio API)
        const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
        
        function playDing() {
            if(audioCtx.state === 'suspended') audioCtx.resume();
            const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
            const gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
            osc.type = 'sine';
            osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(800, audioCtx.currentTime);
            osc.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(1200, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.1);
            gainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(0.2, audioCtx.currentTime);
            gainNode.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.01, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.5);
            osc.connect(gainNode);
            gainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);
            osc.start();
            osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.5);
        }

        function playBuzzer() {
            if(audioCtx.state === 'suspended') audioCtx.resume();
            const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
            const gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
            osc.type = 'sawtooth';
            osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(150, audioCtx.currentTime);
            gainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(0.2, audioCtx.currentTime);
            gainNode.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.01, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.3);
            osc.connect(gainNode);
            gainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);
            osc.start();
            osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.3);
        }

        function shuffleArray(array) {
            for (let i = array.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
                const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
                [array[i], array[j]] = [array[j], array[i]];
            }
        }

        function initGame() {
            const wordPool = document.getElementById('wordPool');
            if(!wordPool) return; 
            
            wordPool.innerHTML = '';
            shuffleArray(wordBank);

            wordBank.forEach(word => {
                const div = document.createElement('div');
                div.classList.add('draggable-word');
                div.setAttribute('draggable', 'true');
                div.setAttribute('id', word.id);
                div.setAttribute('data-target', word.target);
                
                if (word.kanji !== word.kana) {
                    div.innerHTML = `<ruby>${word.kanji}<rt>${word.kana}</rt></ruby>`;
                } else {
                    div.innerText = word.kanji;
                }

                div.addEventListener('dragstart', (e) => {
                    e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', e.target.id);
                    setTimeout(() => e.target.style.opacity = '0.5', 0);
                });

                div.addEventListener('dragend', (e) => {
                    e.target.style.opacity = '1';
                });

                wordPool.appendChild(div);
            });
        }

        // 設定三個目標投放區的監聽
        document.querySelectorAll('.drop-zone').forEach(zone => {
            zone.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                zone.classList.add('drag-over');
            });

            zone.addEventListener('dragleave', () => {
                zone.classList.remove('drag-over');
            });

            zone.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                zone.classList.remove('drag-over');

                const draggedId = e.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain');
                const draggedElement = document.getElementById(draggedId);
                if(!draggedElement) return;
                
                const expectedGroup = draggedElement.getAttribute('data-target');
                const droppedGroup = zone.getAttribute('data-group');

                if (expectedGroup === droppedGroup) {
                    playDing();
                    zone.appendChild(draggedElement);
                    draggedElement.setAttribute('draggable', 'false');
                    zone.classList.add('correct-flash');
                    setTimeout(() => zone.classList.remove('correct-flash'), 500);
                } else {
                    playBuzzer();
                    draggedElement.classList.add('shake-error');
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        draggedElement.classList.remove('shake-error');
                    }, 400);
                }
            });
        });

        // 當網頁載入完成，自動執行洗牌並生成字卡
        window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            initGame();
        });
    // ==========================================
        // Level 1: 1-2 動詞連連看邏輯（嵌入補丁）
        // ==========================================
        let selectedLeft = null;
        let selectedRight = null;

        const leftItems = document.querySelectorAll('#match-left .match-item');
        const rightItems = document.querySelectorAll('#match-right .match-item');

        function checkMatch() {
            if (selectedLeft && selectedRight) {
                const leftId = selectedLeft.getAttribute('data-id');
                const rightMatch = selectedRight.getAttribute('data-match');

                if (leftId === rightMatch) {
                    playDing(); // 直接共享 1-1 的音效函數
                    selectedLeft.classList.remove('selected');
                    selectedRight.classList.remove('selected');
                    selectedLeft.classList.add('matched');
                    selectedRight.classList.add('matched');
                } else {
                    playBuzzer(); // 直接共享 1-1 的音效函數
                    selectedLeft.classList.add('error');
                    selectedRight.classList.add('error');
                    
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        selectedLeft.classList.remove('error', 'selected');
                        selectedRight.classList.remove('error', 'selected');
                        selectedLeft = null;
                        selectedRight = null;
                    }, 400);
                }
                if(leftId === rightMatch) {
                    selectedLeft = null;
                    selectedRight = null;
                }
            }
        }

        leftItems.forEach(item => {
            item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (item.classList.contains('matched')) return;
                if (selectedLeft) selectedLeft.classList.remove('selected');
                selectedLeft = item;
                item.classList.add('selected');
                checkMatch();
            });
        });

        rightItems.forEach(item => {
            item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (item.classList.contains('matched')) return;
                if (selectedRight) selectedRight.classList.remove('selected');
                selectedRight = item;
                item.classList.add('selected');
                checkMatch();
            });
        });

        // ==========================================
        // Level 2: 1-2 填空對話邏輯（嵌入補丁）
        // ==========================================
        const chatInputs = document.querySelectorAll('.chat-input');
        
        chatInputs.forEach(input => {
            input.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
                const correctAnswer = input.getAttribute('data-answer');
                const userAnswer = input.value.trim();
                const bubble = input.closest('.chat-bubble');
                const hintBtn = bubble.querySelector('.hint-btn');
                
                input.classList.remove('wrong');

                if (userAnswer === correctAnswer) {
                    playDing();
                    input.classList.add('correct');
                    input.blur(); 
                    hintBtn.style.display = 'none'; 
                } else if (e.key === 'Enter' && userAnswer !== '') {
                    playBuzzer();
                    input.classList.add('wrong');
                    hintBtn.style.display = 'block'; 
                }
            });
        });

        // 提示按鈕點擊顯示
        const hintBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.hint-btn');
        hintBtns.forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const hintText = btn.nextElementSibling;
                hintText.style.display = 'block';
                btn.style.display = 'none';
            });
        });
    // ==========================================
        // Level 3: 1-3 情境組合解謎邏輯（嵌入補丁）
        // ==========================================
        const tasks = [

                theme: "hospital", title: "🏥 病院",

            {

                fragments: ["飲む", "飲み", "ことができません", "なければなりません"],

                theme: "izakaya", title: "🏮 居酒屋",
                prompt: "任務 B：如果你看起來很年輕，點酒時「必須出示身分證」。",
                fragments: ["見せ", "見さ", "なければなりません", "ないでください"],
                correct: ["見せ", "なければなりません"]
            }
        ];

        let currentTaskIndex = 0;
        let selectedFragments = [null, null];

        function shuffleTaskArray(array) {
            let currentIndex = array.length, randomIndex;
            while (currentIndex !== 0) {
                randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * currentIndex);
                currentIndex--;
                [array[currentIndex], array[randomIndex]] = [array[randomIndex], array[currentIndex]];
            }
            return array;
        }

        function loadTask() {
            const task = tasks[currentTaskIndex];
            const header = document.getElementById('sceneHeader');
            if(!header) return; // 防呆
            
            header.className = `scene-header ${task.theme}`;
            header.innerText = task.title;
            document.getElementById('taskPrompt').innerText = task.prompt;

            selectedFragments = [null, null];
            document.getElementById('slot-0').innerHTML = '';
            document.getElementById('slot-0').className = 'answer-slot';
            document.getElementById('slot-1').innerHTML = '';
            document.getElementById('slot-1').className = 'answer-slot';

            const bank = document.getElementById('wordBank');
            bank.innerHTML = '';
            let shuffled = shuffleTaskArray([...task.fragments]);
            
            shuffled.forEach(text => {
                let btn = document.createElement('button');
                btn.className = 'fragment-btn';
                btn.innerText = text;
                btn.onclick = () => addFragment(text, btn);
                bank.appendChild(btn);
            });

            document.getElementById('checkBtn').style.display = 'inline-block';
            document.getElementById('checkBtn').disabled = false;
            document.getElementById('nextBtn').style.display = 'none';
        }

        function addFragment(text, btnElement) {
            let emptyIndex = selectedFragments.indexOf(null);
            if (emptyIndex !== -1) {
                selectedFragments[emptyIndex] = text;
                let slot = document.getElementById(`slot-${emptyIndex}`);
                slot.innerHTML = `<button class="slotted-fragment">${text}</button>`;
                slot.classList.add('filled');
                btnElement.style.display = 'none';
                slot.setAttribute('data-origin', btnElement.innerText);
            }
        }

        function removeFragment(index) {
            let slot = document.getElementById(`slot-${index}`);
            if (!selectedFragments[index]) return;

            let text = selectedFragments[index];
            selectedFragments[index] = null;
            slot.innerHTML = '';
            slot.classList.remove('filled', 'wrong');

            let buttons = document.querySelectorAll('.fragment-btn');
            buttons.forEach(btn => {
                if (btn.innerText === text && btn.style.display === 'none') {
                    btn.style.display = 'inline-block';
                }
            });
        }

        function checkAnswer() {
            if (selectedFragments.includes(null)) {
                alert("請填滿兩個格子再確認喔！");
                return;
            }

            const task = tasks[currentTaskIndex];
            const slot0 = document.getElementById('slot-0');
            const slot1 = document.getElementById('slot-1');

            if (selectedFragments[0] === task.correct[0] && selectedFragments[1] === task.correct[1]) {
                playDing(); // 延用 1-1 宣告的音效
                slot0.className = 'answer-slot correct';
                slot1.className = 'answer-slot correct';
                slot0.onclick = null;
                slot1.onclick = null;
                document.getElementById('checkBtn').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('nextBtn').style.display = 'inline-block';
            } else {
                playBuzzer(); // 延用 1-1 宣告的音效
                slot0.classList.add('wrong');
                slot1.classList.add('wrong');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    slot0.classList.remove('wrong');
                    slot1.classList.remove('wrong');
                }, 500);
            }
        }

        function nextTask() {
            currentTaskIndex++;
            if (currentTaskIndex < tasks.length) {
                loadTask();
            } else {
                alert("🎉 太厲害了！你已經完全學會日本公共場所的潛規則！");
                currentTaskIndex = 0;
                loadTask();
            }
        }

        // 綁定載入事件
        window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            loadTask();
        });
    // ==========================================
        // Level 4: 1-4 恩惠箭頭模擬器邏輯（嵌入補丁）
        // ==========================================
        let simStep = 1; // 1: 山田給手錶, 2: 切換視角, 3: 山田給書

        // 拖曳處理
        function simDrag(ev) {
            ev.dataTransfer.setData("text", ev.target.id);
        }

        // 讓「私」和「鈴木」可以接收物品
        const watashiNode = document.getElementById('char-watashi');
        const suzukiNode = document.getElementById('char-suzuki');
        
        [watashiNode, suzukiNode].forEach(node => {
            node.addEventListener('dragover', (ev) => ev.preventDefault());
            node.addEventListener('drop', simDrop);
        });

        function simDrop(ev) {
            ev.preventDefault();
            let data = ev.dataTransfer.getData("text");
            let item = document.getElementById(data);
            let dropTarget = ev.currentTarget.id;

            if (simStep === 1 && data === "item-watch" && dropTarget === "char-watashi") {
                // 成功將手錶拖給私
                item.style.top = "200px";
                item.style.left = "350px";
                document.getElementById("lineYtoW").style.opacity = "1";
                document.getElementById("simQuizArea").style.display = "block";
                playDing();
            } 
            else if (simStep === 3 && data === "item-book" && dropTarget === "char-suzuki") {
                // 成功將書拖給鈴木
                item.style.top = "80px";
                item.style.left = "480px";
                document.getElementById("lineYtoS").style.opacity = "1";
                document.getElementById("simQuizArea").style.display = "block";
                document.getElementById("simQuestion").innerText = "山田さんは 鈴木さんに 本を（　　　　）。";
                document.getElementById("simFeedback").innerText = "";
                playDing();
            }
        }

        // 答題邏輯
        function simAnswer(ans) {
            const feedback = document.getElementById("simFeedback");
            
            if (simStep === 1) {
                if (ans === "くれました") {
                    feedback.style.color = "#27AE60";
                    feedback.innerText = "⭕ 正確！別人給我東西，箭頭朝內，使用「くれました」！";
                    playDing();
                    document.getElementById("switchViewBtn").style.display = "block";
                    disableSimButtons();
                } else if (ans === "あげました") {
                    feedback.style.color = "#E74C3C";
                    feedback.innerText = "❌ 錯誤：恩惠箭頭朝向自己時，絕對不能用「あげる」喔！";
                    playBuzzer();
                } else {
                    feedback.style.color = "#E74C3C";
                    feedback.innerText = "❌ 錯誤：注意看主詞！這句話的主詞（が）是山田喔！";
                    playBuzzer();
                }
            } 
            else if (simStep === 2) {
                if (ans === "もらいました") {
                    feedback.style.color = "#27AE60";
                    feedback.innerText = "⭕ 完美！以我為主詞，表達「我得到」，這就是日語思維！";
                    playDing();
                    setTimeout(prepareStep3, 2500); // 2.5秒後進入下一關
                    disableSimButtons();
                } else if (ans === "くれました") {
                    feedback.style.color = "#E74C3C";
                    feedback.innerText = "❌ 錯誤：主詞變成「私」了，我不能「給我自己」呀！";
                    playBuzzer();
                } else {
                    feedback.style.color = "#E74C3C";
                    feedback.innerText = "❌ 錯誤：主詞是自己，不是我給出去！";
                    playBuzzer();
                }
            }
            else if (simStep === 3) {
                if (ans === "あげました") {
                    feedback.style.color = "#27AE60";
                    feedback.innerText = "⭕ 恭喜過關！只要不牽涉到「我」，別人給別人一律用「あげる」！";
                    playDing();
                    disableSimButtons();
                } else {
                    feedback.style.color = "#E74C3C";
                    feedback.innerText = "❌ 錯誤：不牽涉到自己，箭頭往外飛，想想該用哪個？";
                    playBuzzer();
                }
            }
        }

        function disableSimButtons() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.sim-option-btn').forEach(btn => btn.style.pointerEvents = 'none');
        }
        function enableSimButtons() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.sim-option-btn').forEach(btn => btn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto');

    // ==========================================
        // Level 5: 2-1 京都時空修補匠遊戲邏輯（嵌入補丁）
        // ==========================================
        let sortedCount21 = 0;
        const totalCards21 = 4;
        const expectedSequence21 = [1, 2, 3];
        let currentStep21 = 0;

        // 洗牌字卡順序
        const pool21 = document.getElementById('dragPool');
        if (pool21) {
            for (let i = pool21.children.length; i >= 0; i--) {
                pool21.appendChild(pool21.children[Math.random() * i | 0]);
            }
        }

        // 初始化拖曳事件 listener
        document.querySelectorAll('.drag-card').forEach(card => {
            card.addEventListener('dragstart', e => {
                e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', e.target.id);
                setTimeout(() => e.target.style.opacity = '0.5', 0);
            });
            card.addEventListener('dragend', e => {
                e.target.style.opacity = '1';
            });
        });

        document.querySelectorAll('.time-box').forEach(box => {
            box.addEventListener('dragover', e => {
                e.preventDefault();
                box.classList.add('drag-over');
            });
            box.addEventListener('dragleave', () => {
                box.classList.remove('drag-over');
            });
            box.addEventListener('drop', e => {
                e.preventDefault();
                box.classList.remove('drag-over');

                const cardId = e.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain');
                const card = document.getElementById(cardId);
                if (!card || card.classList.contains('sorted')) return;

                const expectedTarget = card.getAttribute('data-target');
                const dropZone = box.getAttribute('data-zone');

                if (expectedTarget === dropZone) {
                    if (typeof playDing === 'function') playDing();
                    card.classList.add('sorted');
                    card.setAttribute('draggable', 'false');
                    box.appendChild(card);

        const poliStage = document.getElementById('poliStage');
        const tempLine = document.getElementById('tempLine');
        const poliSvg = document.getElementById('poliSvg');
        
        let isDrawing = false;
        let startNode = null;
        let connectionAttempt = {}; // 記錄目前的連線嘗試
        
        // 遊戲狀態記錄
        let state23 = {
            k2g: false, // 国民 to 議員
            g2s: false  // 議員 to 首相
        };

        // 綁定所有節點的起點事件 (支援滑鼠與觸控)
        document.querySelectorAll('.poli-node').forEach(node => {
            node.addEventListener('pointerdown', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                isDrawing = true;
                startNode = node;
                
                // 計算起點中心座標
                const rect = node.querySelector('.poli-avatar').getBoundingClientRect();
                const stageRect = poliStage.getBoundingClientRect();
                const startX = rect.left + rect.width / 2 - stageRect.left;
                const startY = rect.top + rect.height / 2 - stageRect.top;
                
                tempLine.setAttribute('x1', startX);
                tempLine.setAttribute('y1', startY);
                tempLine.setAttribute('x2', startX);
                tempLine.setAttribute('y2', startY);
                tempLine.style.display = 'block';
                tempLine.style.stroke = '#BDC3C7'; // 重置為灰色
            });
        });

        // 在畫板上移動時更新線條終點
        poliStage.addEventListener('pointermove', (e) => {
            if (!isDrawing) return;
            const stageRect = poliStage.getBoundingClientRect();
            const mouseX = e.clientX - stageRect.left;
            const mouseY = e.clientY - stageRect.top;
            
            tempLine.setAttribute('x2', mouseX);
            tempLine.setAttribute('y2', mouseY);
        });

        // 停止拖曳時判定
        window.addEventListener('pointerup', (e) => {
            if (!isDrawing) return;
            isDrawing = false;
            
            // 找出滑鼠底下是否為目標節點
            const dropTarget = document.elementFromPoint(e.clientX, e.clientY).closest('.poli-node');
            
            if (dropTarget && dropTarget !== startNode) {
                evaluateConnection(startNode.getAttribute('data-id'), dropTarget.getAttribute('data-id'));
            } else {
                tempLine.style.display = 'none'; // 沒連到東西，線條消失
            }
            startNode = null;
        });

        function evaluateConnection(source, target) {
            // 防呆：連到天皇
            if (target === 'tenno' || source === 'tenno') {
                tempLine.style.stroke = '#E74C3C'; // 線變紅
                if(typeof playBuzzer === 'function') playBuzzer();
                document.getElementById('warningModal').style.display = 'block';
                setTimeout(() => tempLine.style.display = 'none', 500);
                return;
            }

            // 邏輯 1：国民 -> 国会議員
            if ((source === 'kokumin' && target === 'giin') || (source === 'giin' && target === 'kokumin')) {
                if(state23.k2g) { tempLine.style.display = 'none'; return; } // 已解過
                connectionAttempt = { id: 'k2g', lineId: 'lineKokuminToGiin', node: 'node-giin' };
                showVerbModal('① 選挙で選ぶ', '② 話し合って決める', 1);
                return;
            }

            // 邏輯 2：国会議員 -> 内閣総理大臣
            if ((source === 'giin' && target === 'shusho') || (source === 'shusho' && target === 'giin')) {
                if(state23.g2s) { tempLine.style.display = 'none'; return; } // 已解過
                connectionAttempt = { id: 'g2s', lineId: 'lineGiinToShusho', node: 'node-shusho' };
                showVerbModal('① 選挙で選ぶ', '② 話し合って決める', 2);
                return;
            }

            // 亂連其他（例如国民直接連總理）
            tempLine.style.display = 'none';
        }

    /* =========================
    Stage3 Reading Assist JS
    ========================= */
    
    (function () {
        // ------- 工具 -------
        function fmtTime(sec) {
            if (!isFinite(sec)) return "00:00";
            var s = Math.floor(sec % 60).toString().padStart(2, "0");
            var m = Math.floor(sec / 60).toString().padStart(2, "0");
            return m + ":" + s;
        }

        // ------- 3-1 Furigana Toggle（每篇獨立）-------
        document.querySelectorAll("#themes .reading-tools").forEach(function (tools) {
            var lessonClass = tools.getAttribute("data-lesson");
            var lessonRoot = document.querySelector("#themes ." + lessonClass);
            var toggleBtn = tools.querySelector(".furigana-toggle");
            if (!lessonRoot || !toggleBtn) return;

            toggleBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
                lessonRoot.classList.toggle("lesson-furigana-on");
            });
        });

        // ------- 3-2 Tooltip（hover + click）-------
        var tooltip = document.getElementById("globalTooltip");
        if (tooltip) {
            var activeTerm = null;

            function buildTooltip(term) {
                var word = term.textContent.trim();
                var reading = term.getAttribute("data-reading") || "";
                var meaning = term.getAttribute("data-meaning") || "";
                var jlpt = term.getAttribute("data-jlpt") || "";
                tooltip.innerHTML =
                    '<div class="t-head">' +
                    '<div class="t-word">' + word + "</div>" +
                    (jlpt ? '<div class="t-jlpt">' + jlpt + "</div>" : "") +
                    "</div>" +
                    (reading ? '<div class="t-reading">' + reading + "</div>" : "") +
                    (meaning ? '<div class="t-meaning">' + meaning + "</div>" : "");
                }

                function placeTooltip(term) {
                    var rect = term.getBoundingClientRect();
                    var tipRect = tooltip.getBoundingClientRect();
                    var top = rect.top - tipRect.height - 10;
                    var left = rect.left + rect.width / 2 - tipRect.width / 2;

                if (top < 8) top = rect.bottom + 10;
                if (left < 8) left = 8;
                if (left + tipRect.width > window.innerWidth - 8) {
                    left = window.innerWidth - tipRect.width - 8;
                }

                tooltip.style.top = top + "px";
                tooltip.style.left = left + "px";
            }

            function showTooltip(term) {
            activeTerm = term;
            buildTooltip(term);
            tooltip.hidden = false;
            tooltip.classList.add("show");
            placeTooltip(term);
        }

        function hideTooltip() {
            activeTerm = null;
            tooltip.classList.remove("show");
            tooltip.hidden = true;
        }

        document.addEventListener("mouseover", function (e) {
            var term = e.target.closest(".vocab-term");
            if (!term || !document.querySelector("#themes").contains(term)) return;
            showTooltip(term);
        });

        document.addEventListener("mousemove", function (e) {
            if (!activeTerm) return;
            if (!e.target.closest(".vocab-term")) return;
            placeTooltip(activeTerm);
        });

        document.addEventListener("mouseout", function (e) {
            if (!activeTerm) return;
            var toEl = e.relatedTarget;
            if (toEl && toEl.closest && toEl.closest(".vocab-term") === activeTerm) return;
            if (toEl && tooltip.contains(toEl)) return;
            hideTooltip();
        });

        document.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
            var term = e.target.closest(".vocab-term");
            if (term && document.querySelector("#themes").contains(term)) {
                showTooltip(term); // 手機 click 可觸發
            } else if (!tooltip.contains(e.target)) {
                hideTooltip();
            }
        });

        window.addEventListener("resize", function () {
            if (activeTerm) placeTooltip(activeTerm);
        });
        window.addEventListener("scroll", function () {
            if (activeTerm) placeTooltip(activeTerm);
        }, { passive: true });
    }

    // ------- 3-3 TTS（即時朗讀，不含 rt）+ 語速 + 段落同步 -------
const synth = window.speechSynthesis;

// 把 ruby 的 <rt> 去掉，只朗讀正文（ruby base 文字）
function getParagraphTextWithoutRt(paragraphEl) {
  const clone = paragraphEl.cloneNode(true);
  clone.querySelectorAll("rt").forEach(rt => rt.remove());
  return (clone.textContent || "").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
}

// 優先找日文語音（如果系統沒有也能用預設語音照讀）
function pickJapaneseVoice() {
  const voices = synth.getVoices ? synth.getVoices() : [];
  return (
    voices.find(v => v.lang === "ja-JP") ||
    voices.find(v => (v.lang || "").toLowerCase().startsWith("ja")) ||
    null
  );
}

document.querySelectorAll("#themes .reading-tools").forEach(function (tools) {
  const lessonClass = tools.getAttribute("data-lesson");
  const lessonRoot = document.querySelector("#themes ." + lessonClass);
  if (!lessonRoot) return;

  const playBtn = tools.querySelector(".audio-play-btn");
  const progress = tools.querySelector(".audio-progress");
  const speed = tools.querySelector(".audio-speed");
  const timeText = tools.querySelector(".audio-time");
  const paragraphs = Array.from(lessonRoot.querySelectorAll(".jp-paragraph"));

  if (!playBtn || !progress || !speed || !timeText || paragraphs.length === 0) return;

  let isPlaying = false;
  let currentIndex = 0;

  function setActiveParagraph(index) {
    paragraphs.forEach((p, i) => p.classList.toggle("active", i === index));
  }

  function updateUIForIndex(index) {
    currentIndex = index;
    setActiveParagraph(index);

    // 用「段落進度」取代秒數進度
    timeText.textContent = `第 ${index + 1} 段 / 共 ${paragraphs.length} 段`;

    if (paragraphs.length <= 1) {
      progress.value = 0;
    } else {
      progress.value = (index / (paragraphs.length - 1)) * 100;
    }
  }

  // 開始朗讀：從第 i 段開始依序朗讀到結束
  function speakFrom(i) {
    // 全域停止（避免同時多段朗讀）
    synth.cancel();

    isPlaying = true;
    playBtn.textContent = "❚❚";
    updateUIForIndex(i);

    const text = getParagraphTextWithoutRt(paragraphs[currentIndex]);
    if (!text) {
      // 沒文字就直接跳下一段
      const next = currentIndex + 1;
      if (next < paragraphs.length) return speakFrom(next);
      isPlaying = false;
      playBtn.textContent = "▶";
      paragraphs.forEach(p => p.classList.remove("active"));
      return;
    }

    const utter = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
    utter.lang = "ja-JP";
    utter.rate = parseFloat(speed.value || "1");
    const voice = pickJapaneseVoice();
    if (voice) utter.voice = voice;

    utter.onend = function () {
      if (!isPlaying) return;

      const next = currentIndex + 1;
      if (next < paragraphs.length) {
        speakFrom(next);
      } else {
        isPlaying = false;
        playBtn.textContent = "▶";
        paragraphs.forEach(p => p.classList.remove("active"));
        currentIndex = 0;
        // 播放完回到第 1 段的高亮狀態（你可改成不高亮）
        updateUIForIndex(0);
      }
    };

    utter.onerror = function () {
      // 朗讀錯誤就當成結束，避免卡死
      isPlaying = false;
      playBtn.textContent = "▶";
      paragraphs.forEach(p => p.classList.remove("active"));
    };

    synth.speak(utter);
  }

  playBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
    // 點播放時第一次是從 currentIndex 開始
    if (!isPlaying) {
      // 使用者手勢觸發：才比較不會被瀏覽器擋
      speakFrom(currentIndex);
      return;
    }

    // 已在朗讀：切換暫停/繼續
    if (synth.paused) {
      synth.resume();
      playBtn.textContent = "❚❚";
    } else {
      synth.pause();
      playBtn.textContent = "▶";
    }
  });

  // 拖曳進度條 = 跳到某段再朗讀（若正在播放會重頭套用）
  progress.addEventListener("input", function () {
    const pct = parseFloat(progress.value || "0");
    const idx = (paragraphs.length <= 1)
      ? 0
      : Math.round((pct / 100) * (paragraphs.length - 1));

    updateUIForIndex(idx);

    if (isPlaying) {
      speakFrom(idx);
    }
  });

  // 語速切換：若正在播放，重啟當前段以套用新 rate
  speed.addEventListener("change", function () {
    if (isPlaying) {
      speakFrom(currentIndex);
    }
  });

  // 初始 UI
  updateUIForIndex(0);
});
})();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
